# Changelog

All notable changes to supply-drop-bbs are documented here.
Versioning follows [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/) (pre-1.0:
minor bumps may carry breaking changes).

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->
## [0.11.0] — 2026-07-12

### Bug Fixes

- Repair offline-queue drain state machine + audit corrections ([`2e9d5af`](2e9d5af7aab7c79a8c6e0cc62c5f9c93ab4cda5f))
- Unique per-send timestamps so identical replies aren't dedup-dropped ([`267ab97`](267ab97c3f6a4b23fdd6241c102891c8c81d61de))
- Workflow idle-timeout + capture full_pubkey to unblock flooding ([`1e52128`](1e521287e25dedd1c610e31d80b90b577df9f71f))
- Describe autoadd_config bit 0 as overwrite-oldest, not auto-add gate ([`0f39a76`](0f39a76539a89850675962d1f69e61fec1e01999))

### Features

- Show inbound message-health counters on the Metrics page ([`a649d7e`](a649d7e948861deaee18761b87fc27c96f4ff48d))
- Instrument inbound deliverability and harden message fetch ([`3aa4e37`](3aa4e376fbb7946b0b7e13aceeb2629afa92d847))

### Testing

- Add deliverability repro harness example ([`9502c2b`](9502c2ba2055b3e45179ee99389014fa83c7fbe7))

## [0.10.2] — 2026-07-11

### Bug Fixes

- Grant serial access across distros (dialout vs plugdev) ([`3b62bad`](3b62baddd41d715fd04458eca647c1c4a3d2454a))
